stories.title: US Open Round 1 UNDERWAY — Scheffler's Grand Slam Chase Begins as Shinnecock Wind Howls
stories.angle: Round 1 of the 126th US Open is underway at Shinnecock Hills. The USGA moved up tee times by 30 minutes (starting 6:35 AM ET) to help morning groups beat the afternoon wind. Forecasts show sustained 12-24 mph winds with gusts 35-40+ mph expected this afternoon — the kind of conditions that Shinnecock Hills amplifies brutally. Scottie Scheffler is the centerpiece: he is pursuing the career Grand Slam today, needing only a US Open to complete the set. The 2018 US Open at Shinnecock produced no player under par for the week.

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
The 2026 U.S. Open is underway at Shinnecock Hills. 🏌️

Wind forecast for this afternoon:
🌬️ Sustained: 12-24 mph
💨 Gusts: 35-40+ mph

Morning starters got calm conditions.
Afternoon wave gets this.

Scheffler's Grand Slam chase begins today. #USOpen #Golf

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
In 2018, NO player finished under par at Shinnecock Hills.

Brooks Koepka won at +1. The Round 3 scoring average was 75.3.

Today the wind gusts are expected at 40 mph.

The U.S. Open at Shinnecock doesn't forgive anyone. #USOpen #ShinnecockHills

article.headline: US Open Round 1: Scheffler's Grand Slam Chase Begins as Shinnecock Hills Wind Arrives

stories.title: LIV Golf Crisis — Saudi PIF Ends Funding, CEO Fundraising, New Orleans Postponed
stories.angle: LIV Golf's existential crisis is deepening. Saudi Arabia's Public Investment Fund has confirmed it will end funding after the 2026 season. The league has already postponed its New Orleans event. CEO Scott O'Neil is in active fundraising mode — 5 formal meetings completed, 18 more planned — seeking $250-350M in new investment. A new independent board (Gene Davis and Jon Zinman) has been established. Annual losses estimated at $500-600M. Only $200M of $600M committed for 2026 has been delivered.

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
LIV Golf by the numbers:

$5 billion invested by Saudi Arabia since 2022.
$500-600M in annual losses.
New Orleans event: postponed.
Saudi PIF: exiting after 2026.

CEO O'Neil is seeking $250-350M from private investors.

The clock is ticking. ⏰ #LIVGolf #Golf

article.headline: LIV Golf's Survival Race: Saudi Money Gone, CEO in Emergency Fundraising Mode

stories.title: Scheffler Grand Slam — Sunday Could Be His 30th Birthday and the Greatest Day in Golf
stories.angle: If Scottie Scheffler wins the 2026 US Open, the final round falls on Sunday, June 21 — Father's Day AND his 30th birthday. He would become the 7th player ever to complete the career Grand Slam. He has won Masters (2022, 2024), PGA Championship (2025), and The Open (2025). He needs only a US Open. Only Tiger Woods won all four majors for the first time on first-attempt Grand Slam; Scheffler is trying to match that. He enters at +550 odds.

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Scottie Scheffler needs ONE major for the Grand Slam.

If he wins the 2026 U.S. Open, the final round is June 21.

That's Father's Day.
That's his 30th birthday.

Only 6 players in history have completed the Grand Slam.
He could be No. 7. 🏆 #Scheffler #USOpen

article.headline: Scheffler's Birthday Grand Slam: Sunday Could Be the Greatest Day in Golf in Decades

stories.title: Shinnecock Hills — Why This Is the Most Brutal US Open Venue
stories.angle: No player finished under par at Shinnecock Hills in 2018 — not even the winner. Brooks Koepka won at 1-over 281. The third round scoring average was 75.3. The course setup in 2018 was so extreme that the USGA had to water greens mid-round. Wind on the exposed Southampton coastline turns a normal course into something unmanageable. Today's forecast: 12-24 mph sustained, gusts 40 mph in the afternoon. The afternoon wave is going to be fighting the same conditions that humiliated the world's best in 2018.

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
2018 U.S. Open at Shinnecock Hills:

• No player finished under par
• Winner (Koepka): +1 total
• Round 3 scoring avg: 75.3
• USGA had to water greens mid-round

The 2026 afternoon wave is dealing with 40 mph gusts.

History is about to repeat itself. 😬 #USOpen #ShinnecockHills

article.headline: Shinnecock Hills Is the Most Brutal US Open Venue — And Thursday Proves It Again

stories.title: Meijer LPGA Classic Round 1 — Blythefield Michigan, Father's Day Free Sunday
stories.angle: The Meijer LPGA Classic for Simply Give begins today (June 18-21) at Blythefield Country Club in Belmont, Michigan — running parallel to the US Open. The $3M purse event features 144 LPGA players. Unique promotion: Father's Day (June 21) means free general admission for dads. Kids 17 and under are also free all week. The KPMG Women's PGA Championship follows June 25-28 at Hazeltine National, making this a significant back-to-back week for women's golf.

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Golf Thursday reminder:

The U.S. Open isn't the only event teeing off today.

Meijer LPGA Classic begins NOW at Blythefield CC, Michigan.

144 players. $3M purse.
Father's Day (June 21) = FREE for dads.

Two tournaments. One big golf weekend. ⛳ #LPGA #Golf
